title: [1.21.8] fpesesser
description: Makes your game reach high FPS while keeping the vanilla experience
body:
![the thumb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67b7dd0c5a0aa8b22520e49812ebca109f4c2bd2.png)This modpack aims to improve your performance without a lot of mods and it keeps the vanilla experience while giving you high FPS
